steps.title: Graph or check the choices
steps.content: Since the answer choices are ordered pairs, the quickest method is to check which point lies on both graphs. Graph both equations and read an intersection point.

steps.title: Test the matching point
steps.content: Test $(0,4)$: $$5(0)+4=4$$ and $$5(0)^2+4=4$$ Both equations give $y=4$, so $(0,4)$ satisfies the system.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: A choice with the right $x$ but wrong $y$. The two points with $x=8$ fail. The point that satisfies both equations is $(0,4)$, so B is correct.
